publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-11-18 23:02:39 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

accessrestrict.head: Restrictions on Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 14 restricted until 2029 or by permission of donor.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and drafts pertaining to Salpeter and Hans Bethe's work in Handbuch der Physik XXXV; also, correspondence, announcements, reports, reprints, lecture notes, examinations and other material pertaining to Salpeter's involvement with the National Science Foundation and the National Science Board, especially concerning national science policy. Also, includes autobiography of Edwin's father, Jakob Salpeter and minutes of the Arecibo Technical Committee meetings.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Edwin E. Salpeter Papers, #14-22-2574. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Notes in notebooks on colloquia Salpeter listened to at Binhamton University
Notes in notebooks on colloquia Salpeter listened to at Cornell

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Sample course material from the first and last courses taught

did.unittitle: Lecture notes for upper level undergraduate courses and first year graduate courses

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Some lectures given to Hans Bethe's classes from 1950-1952

Virgo cluster dynamics and galaxy cluster
Helium burning notes for Cox and Deinzer papers

Production of Helium in Massive Objects

FIR Stars and IRAS Point Cirrus with Possible HI Bubbles

Preparations for colloquia and invited talks

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes refer to the transfer of Geology to Engineering and the appointment of Jack Oliver as chair

did.unittitle: Copy of a book Salpeter's father wrote and an unpublished autobiography of his
Arecibo Technical Committee minutes and notes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Salpeter was chair of the committee
